mentions_legales.quote: Route de la Galaise 32, 1228 Plan-les-Ouates, Geneva, Switzerland

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Proton’s Privacy Policy describes how Proton collects, uses, and deletes your data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: The Services are operated by Proton AG (the "Company", "We"), domiciled at Route de la Galaise 32, 1228 Plan-les-Ouates, Geneva, Switzerland.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Data collection is limited to the following: **2.1 Visiting proton.me or protonvpn.com website:** We employ a local installation of self-developed analytics tools. [...] **2.2 Account creation**: Depending on the Services you want to use, you can either create a Proton account with a Proton Mail address, or use an external (non-Proton) address.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: The legal basis for processing is consent and you are free to modify this in your Account settings panel at any time.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: It is not necessary to provide personal information in order to create an Account.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: The period of temporary data retention is determined by our legitimate interests of protecting the service from spam, and also by any applicable Swiss legal requirements we must comply with.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We rely on third parties, such as Zendesk or Calendly (see below). If you use Proton's live chat support, you consent to having the data contained within your live chat interaction processed by Zendesk Inc, the provider of Proton's live chat support platform.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We do not have the technical means to access the content of your encrypted emails, files, calendar events, passwords, or notes.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: In case of violation of your rights, you have the right to lodge a complaint to the competent supervisory authority.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Through your Account interface, you can directly access, edit, delete, or export personal data processed by the Company in your use of the Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Through your Account interface, you can directly access, edit, delete, or export personal data processed by the Company in your use of the Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Through your Account interface, you can directly access, edit, delete, or export personal data processed by the Company in your use of the Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Through your Account interface, you can directly access, edit, delete, or export personal data processed by the Company in your use of the Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Through your Account interface, you can directly access, edit, delete, or export personal data processed by the Company in your use of the Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can stop receiving emails from us by following the unsubscribe instructions included in every email we send.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Détail des types de cookies déposés
Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: We employ a local installation of self-developed analytics tools.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Analytics are anonymized whenever possible and stored locally (and not on the cloud).

identite.purpose: Aucune mention explicite de collecte de nom, prénom ou date de naissance pour la création de compte ou l'utilisation des services.

contact.quote: You can provide an external email address for notification or password recovery purposes. Should you choose to provide it, we associate this email address with your Account (for password recovery or notification purposes).
contact.purpose: Utilisation de l'email pour notifications, récupération de mot de passe et communications liées à la sécurité ou aux produits Proton.

compte_auth.quote: Creating a Proton account will give you access to all our Services. [...] Verification may also be requested for some sensitive operations besides account creation in order to protect against brute-force attacks. You may be asked to verify using either Proton Captcha, email, or SMS.
compte_auth.purpose: Création de compte, authentification et vérification pour prévenir les abus (spam, attaques par force brute).

paiement.quote: We rely on Chargebee to process payments. Strictly necessary information is shared with Chargebee for credit card, PayPal, Stripe and Bitcoin transactions in order for the payment to be successful and associated with your account. [...] We do not retain full credit card details, we only save your name and the last 4 digits of the credit card number.
paiement.purpose: Traitement des paiements pour les services Proton, incluant nom et derniers chiffres de la carte bancaire.

localisation.quote: Our applications do not access or track any location-based information from your device.
localisation.purpose: Aucune collecte de données de localisation.

appareil_technique.quote: When you use our native applications, including mobile and desktop versions, we (or platform and operating system providers) may collect certain technical information. [...] IP logs may be kept temporarily to combat abuse and fraud, and your IP address may be retained permanently if you are engaged in activities that breach our Terms of Service.
appareil_technique.purpose: Collecte d'informations techniques (IP, appareil, OS) pour lutter contre la fraude et améliorer les services.

usage_comportement.quote: We employ a local installation of self-developed analytics tools. Analytics are anonymized whenever possible and stored locally (and not on the cloud). [...] We may use analytics software, app statistics and crash reporting, or other tools to help diagnose problems, send information to our developers in order to rapidly fix bugs and improve our services.
usage_comportement.purpose: Analyse anonymisée de l'usage et du comportement pour améliorer les services et corriger les bugs.

contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Aucune mention explicite de collecte de contenus créés par l'utilisateur (ex : emails chiffrés, fichiers).

communications.quote: Your communications with us, such as support requests, bug reports, or feature requests may be saved by our staff. [...] If you use Proton's live chat support, you consent to having the data contained within your live chat interaction processed by Zendesk Inc.
communications.purpose: Collecte des communications avec le support (demandes, rapports de bugs, chats en direct).

contacts_reseau.quote: No mention of collecting address book or social network contacts.
contacts_reseau.purpose: Aucune collecte du carnet d'adresses ou des contacts réseau.

donnees_tiers.quote: If you are coming to Proton via a referral program, your subscription may be attributed to the referrer. Some referrals are managed internally by Proton while others may rely upon third-party platforms used by the referrers, and if you are coming to Proton via a referrer, our site may communicate with such referrer platforms for the purposes of crediting referrers.
donnees_tiers.purpose: Données obtenues via des plateformes tierces pour les programmes de parrainage.

biometrie.quote: No mention of biometric data collection.

donnees_sensibles.quote: No mention of processing health, opinions, or other sensitive data under Article 9 GDPR.

mineurs.purpose: Aucune mention explicite de collecte de données de mineurs.

legal_bases.quote: The legal basis for processing is consent and you are free to modify this in your Account settings panel at any time.
If you use Proton's live chat support, you consent to having the data contained within your live chat interaction processed by Zendesk Inc

By signing up to our Service, you agree to receive communications from us, which may include promotional emails. You can stop receiving emails from us by following the unsubscribe instructions included in every email we send.
The legal basis of these processing activities is the necessity to the execution of the contract to provide the Services.
In order to pursue our legitimate interest of preventing the creation of accounts by spam bots or human spammers, we use a variety of human verification methods.
The legal basis of this processing is our legitimate interest to protect our service against non-compliant or fraudulent activities.
The legal basis for this processing is our legitimate interest to troubleshoot more efficiently and improve the quality of our Services.
The legal basis for processing is our legitimate interest to troubleshoot more efficiently and improve the quality of our Services.
The legal basis for this processing is our legitimate interest to operate our website economically.

transfers.quote: Data processing location: United States, Singapore (PayPal); Taiwan (R.O.C) (ProtonLabs Taiwan Co., Ltd); United Kingdom (Atlassian Pty Ltd); Macedonia (ProtonLabs DOOEL Skopje).
